name: Create Tables
func:
msg.topic = `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounts (uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, balance REAL DEFAULT 0, status TEXT DEFAULT 'active', created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')))`;
return msg;

name: Handle Scan
Process Account
Send Account to UI
Send History to UI
func:
msg.payload = { type: 'history', rows: msg.payload };
return msg;

name: Handle Transaction Input
Update Balance
TXN Success
Handle Heartbeat

name: Create Transactions table
func:
msg.topic = `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transactions (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, uid TEXT NOT NULL, type TEXT NOT NULL, amount REAL NOT NULL, balance_after REAL NOT NULL, timestamp TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')), teller TEXT DEFAULT 'operator')`;
return msg;

name: Store Scanned UID
Admin Action Router
Enroll Result
func:
msg.payload = { type: 'admin_result', success: true, message: 'Card enrolled successfully.', resetEnroll: true };
return msg;

name: Accounts List Result
func:
msg.payload = { type: 'accounts_list', accounts: msg.payload };
return msg;

name: Status Result
func:
msg.payload = { type: 'admin_result', success: true, message: 'Account updated successfully.' };
return msg;

name: Delete Result
func:
msg.payload = { type: 'admin_result', success: true, message: 'Account deleted.' };
return msg;
